ab: naqunian su mawtu?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: semaqay iku mawtu.
en: I came on foot.

ab: mezaqis isu tu niana qitun mawtu?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: qabasu iku mawtu.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: naqunian su matiw ta sasubatan?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: masulun tu tama ku pasaqay tu qitun matiw.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: naqunian na matiw sa taqsian?
en: A: How does he get to school?

ab: qaciyeyun aizipna matiw sa taqsian.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: naqunian na bai su matiw meRasa tu tamun?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: qautubay aizipna matiw meRasa tu tamun.
en: B: She rode a motorcycle to the grocery store.

ab: naqunian su matiw sa lani?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: qabawa’ iku matiw sa lani.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: naqunian na matiw sa lani?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: qaRikuki aizipna matiw sa lani.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: niana qitun zaqisan na matiw sa kawsiyung?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: qakawtiye aizipna matiw sa kawsiyung.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: qagasuling aizipna matiw sa taytung ni?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: en, qagasuling aizipna matiw sa taytung.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: qagasuling aizipna matiw sa taytung ni?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ussa, qaRikuki aizipna matiw sa taytung.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: tazian yau mezaki ay teqezan na basu ni?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: yau, pasa ngayaw ka semaqay maqayta ti teqezan na basu.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: tazian mezaki tu teqezan na ciyeyun ay tanian?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: mai tu teqezan na ciyeyun tazian, qanengi isu mezaqis tu cicence.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: qabasu matiw sa taqsian qumni tuzus?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Rabetin yau ulima tunek qaseq ti tu taqsian.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: qakawtiye qatani dukian qaseq tu taycung?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: ussiq dukian qaseq ti tu taycung.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: pasaqay tu qitun sa ulay qatenes ni?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: qaussiq dukian si yu.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: qaciyeyun isu mawtu sa leppaw ku utani qatenes na?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: qauzusa betin tunekan.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: suppaR isu qazitinsia ni?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: suppaR iku qazitinsia.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: yau utubay su ni?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: yau ussiq utubay ku.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: yau utubay su ni?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: mai iku tu utubay.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
